reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio y servicompra ,con  lugar adecuado para tomar infusiones, cafetería,se puede censr y almorzar, solo minutas y sandwicheria para consumo en el lugar o llevar ,el servicompra cierta a las 22 horas y no hay lugares dónde hospedarse

(Translated by Google)
Service station and convenience store, with a suitable place to have tea, cafeteria, you can stop for lunch, only quick meals and sandwiches for consumption on site or takeaway, the convenience store closes at 10pm and there are no places to stay
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNobktDR3pRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Había muchísima gente. Estaban colapsados. Pero aún así me pareció bien. Baños podrían mejorar la limpieza

(Translated by Google)
There were so many people. They were packed. But I still thought it was fine. The bathrooms could be cleaner.
